---
id: get-device-definitions
title: "查询设备详细信息"
description: "获取指定设备的详细信息，包括设备类型、端点列表、属性列表等。"
sidebar_label: "查询设备详细信息"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/aiot-api/aiot-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查询设备详细信息"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/devices/definitions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



获取指定设备的详细信息，包括设备类型、端点列表、属性列表等。

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"Accesstoken","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Accesstoken}}"},"description":"通过授权获取的访问 Token。"},{"name":"Appid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Appid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 App ID。"},{"name":"Keyid","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Keyid}}"},"description":"在 [Aqara 开发者平台](https://developer.aqara.com/) 创建应用时分配的 Key ID。"},{"name":"Nonce","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Nonce}}"},"description":"随机字符串，每次请求都不同。"},{"name":"Time","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Time}}"},"description":"请求时间戳，单位毫秒。"},{"name":"Sign","in":"header","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","example":"{{Sign}}"},"description":"请求签名。如需了解签名生成方法，请参考 [Sign 生成规则](https://opendoc.aqara.cn/docs/%E4%BA%91%E5%BC%80%E5%8F%91/API%E4%BD%BF%E7%94%A8%E6%8C%87%E5%8D%97/Sign%E7%94%9F%E6%88%90%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99.html)。"},{"name":"Lang","in":"header","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["zh","en"],"example":"en"},"description":"语言，默认英文。支持 'zh', 'en' 两种语言。"},{"name":"deviceIds","in":"query","required":true,"description":"设备 ID 列表，支持一次查询最多 10 个设备。示例：deviceIds=xx1,xx2 或 deviceIds=xx1&deviceIds=xx2。","schema":{"type":"array","maxItems":10,"items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"includeValues","in":"query","required":false,"description":"是否包含各 trait 的当前值（`value`）与上报时间（`time`）。默认 `false` 时仅返回能力定义元数据，结构与 `true` 相同但trait值value字段可能为空或是不准确的旧值；为 `true` 时会拉取设备的当前trait值。\n","schema":{"type":"boolean","default":false}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"请求发起成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型。"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本。","example":"v4"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID。"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功。"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息。"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","name","deviceTypesList","endpoints"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备 ID"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"设备名称。"},"deviceTypesList":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"设备类型列表。"},"endpoints":{"type":"array","description":"端点列表。","items":{"type":"object","required":["endpointId","endpointName","deviceType","functions"],"properties":{"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点 ID。"},"endpointName":{"type":"string","description":"端点名称。"},"deviceType":{"type":"string","description":"设备类型。"},"functions":{"type":"array","description":"功能列表。","items":{"type":"object","required":["functionCode"],"properties":{"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码（如 LevelControl, ColorControl, Output）。"},"traits":{"type":"array","description":"功能点列表。","items":{"type":"object","required":["traitCode","parameter"],"properties":{"traitCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能点代码（如 CurrentLevel, ColorTemperature, OnOff）。"},"parameter":{"description":"功能点属性。","allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"数据类型。<br />\n<table>\n  <thead>\n    <tr>\n      <th>名称</th>\n      <th>类型</th>\n      <th>说明</th>\n    </tr>\n  </thead>\n  <tbody>\n    <tr>\n      <td>Bool</td>\n      <td>布尔型</td>\n      <td>真或假（true/false）。</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>Integer</td>\n      <td>整型</td>\n      <td>整数类型。</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>Float</td>\n      <td>浮点型</td>\n      <td>带小数的数字。</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>String</td>\n      <td>字符型</td>\n      <td>字符串。</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>Struct</td>\n      <td>结构体</td>\n      <td>Aqara 自定义的结构数据，形式为 JSON 字符串。<br />可以包含多种类型字段。</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>Enum</td>\n      <td>枚举</td>\n      <td>枚举类型，定义有限个取值。</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>List[X]</td>\n      <td>列表</td>\n      <td>元素类型为 X 的列表，形式为 JSON 字符串。<br />X 可为 Integer、Float、String、Struct、Enum。</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>Data</td>\n      <td>数据块</td>\n      <td>16 进制字符串（Hex String），如 \"0x01AB3F\"。</td>\n    </tr>\n  </tbody>\n</table>\n","enum":["Bool","Float","Integer","Enum","String","Struct","List[X]","Data"]},"min":{"type":"number","description":"最小值。","format":"double","nullable":true},"max":{"type":"number","description":"最大值。","format":"double","nullable":true},"supportedValues":{"description":"枚举值列表。仅当 parameter.type 为 Enum 时，此字段有意义。","type":"array","items":{"type":"object","description":"键值对。","required":["key","value"],"properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"键。"},"value":{"type":"string","description":"值。"}},"title":"KeyValue"},"nullable":true},"unit":{"description":"单位。仅当 parameter.type 为 Integer 或 Float 时，此字段有意义。","type":"string","nullable":true},"step":{"description":"步长。仅当 parameter.type 为 Integer 或 Float 时，此字段有意义。","type":"number","format":"double","nullable":true}},"title":"BaseParameter"},{"type":"object","required":["readable","writable","subscribable"],"properties":{"readable":{"type":"boolean","description":"是否可读。","default":true},"writable":{"type":"boolean","description":"是否可写。","default":true},"subscribable":{"type":"boolean","description":"是否可订阅。","default":true}}}],"title":"TraitParameter"},"value":{"description":"当前值。类型与 parameter.type 的值保持一致。","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"},"time":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"值更新时间（毫秒级
